# Jillaine Tattoo

> Award-winning colour realism tattoo artist based in Kelowna, British Columbia, Canada.

Jillaine is a professional tattoo artist specializing exclusively in colour realism tattoos. She is known for vibrant, high-quality ink with exceptional longevity. She works out of District Ink Tattoo Studio in Kelowna, BC and serves clients locally and from around the world.

## Specialties

- Colour realism tattoos (her exclusive style)
- Cover-up tattoos — transforming old or unwanted ink into new custom designs
- Nature and landscape tattoos (northern lights, forests, wildlife)
- Space and galaxy tattoos
- Animal portraits and wildlife realism
- Large-scale and multi-session pieces (minimum 2 hours)

## Location

District Ink Tattoo Studio
1990 Landsdowne Pl #3
Kelowna, BC, Canada

## Booking

Jillaine accepts clients by consultation request only. Submissions are reviewed and responded to within 2 weeks. She does not do script, neo-traditional, traditional, or linework — colour realism only, minimum 2 hour pieces.

Book a free consultation: https://jillainetattoo.com/contact
